I-276 East to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take I-76 East to Route I-476 North. This will bring you to the Mid-County Interchange (20).
Detour Information
Take I-76 East to Route I-476 North. This will bring you to the Mid-County Interchange (20).
Ramp from Atwater Dr to I-76

I-76 West to close, from Sunday, April 19 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take US 30 East (4.6 miles) to PA Toll 66 North (7 miles) to US 22 West (10.5 miles).
